primary_issue.title: Keep dogfood installed overlays in sync with canonical preset overlays
primary_issue.reason: intake/handoff 主 issue，本任务承诺完整解决。
acceptance_evidence: 运行 trellis/presets/guru-team/scripts/bash/apply.sh --repo .，同步 dogfood installed overlay copies；结果无 .new，临时 .bak 已人工检查后删除。
运行 trellis/presets/guru-team/scripts/bash/check-dogfood-overlay-drift.sh，确认 dogfood overlay copies match canonical Guru Team overlays。
运行 trellis/presets/guru-team/scripts/bash/verify-throwaway-install.sh，确认新临时仓库可通过 guru-team marketplace workflow 初始化、apply preset、执行 check-env --json。
运行 python3 -m json.tool、bash -n、python3 -m py_compile、task.py validate 和 git diff --check，均通过。

close_issues.title: Keep dogfood installed overlays in sync with canonical preset overlays
close_issues.reason: 本任务同步 dogfood installed overlay copies，新增 drift check，并更新维护文档。
acceptance_evidence: 新增 trellis/presets/guru-team/scripts/bash/check-dogfood-overlay-drift.sh，只读比较 canonical overlay 与 dogfood installed copy。
同步 .agents、.codex、.cursor dogfood overlay，并安装缺失的 .claude/commands/trellis/* dogfood entries。
README、trellis/presets/guru-team/README.md、AGENTS.md、workflow 与 .trellis/spec 均记录 overlay drift check 和 .new/.bak 处理要求。
